reasoning: The FedRAMP CP-2 (2) control focuses on contingency planning and capacity planning, which in Kubernetes can be addressed through resource management and scaling mechanisms. Resource quotas ensure that namespaces do not exceed their allocated resources, preventing resource exhaustion. Horizontal Pod Autoscalers and Cluster Autoscalers help manage workloads by automatically adjusting the number of pods or nodes based on demand, ensuring capacity is available. Pod Disruption Budgets help maintain application availability during voluntary disruptions, contributing to contingency planning.
title: Contingency Plan | Capacity Planning
